timing_disclosure: Frozen after the 751 block was opened but before run completion, retrieval, any point summary, or any S1 outcome reduction. The method is inherited unchanged from the audited Program O full-DES H_PI validation.

inference.method: paired tape bootstrap with the best of all 65536 open-loop calendars reselected and the guardrail-safe oracle recomputed in every resample
inference.simultaneous_family: all 480 S-NATIVE Morris point x product-cell safe H_PI estimands
inference.critical_value: 95th percentile using method=higher of the maximum point-estimate-minus-bootstrap-estimate error

early_exit.rule: STOP iff the maximum simultaneous LCB95(H_PI_safe) across all 480 points is strictly below 0.01

fail_closed_requirements: exact manifest identity and SHA-256 verification
exact shard schema, dimensions, finite matrices, cell identity, calendar identity, and hashes
direct replay maximum absolute error at most 1e-10
